leagueBriefing: The Buffalo Sabres claimed the Atlantic Division lead in an 15-goal thriller against Tampa Bay, while Nathan MacKinnon furthered his MVP case by leading the Avalanche over the Wild in a heavyweight shootout.

games.headline: MacKinnon nets league-leading 43rd goal and shootout winner to edge Wild
games.brief: In a clash of NHL titans, Nathan MacKinnon once again proved to be the difference-maker. After the Wild surged to a third-period lead with two quick goals, the Avalanche forced overtime and leaned on their superstar in the shootout. MacKinnon, who has a history of haunting Minnesota, solidified Colorado’s standing among the league's elite points leaders.
bullets: Nathan MacKinnon scored his NHL-best 43rd goal and now has 70 points in 55 career games against Minnesota.
Scott Wedgewood made 32 saves and continues to lead the NHL in goals against average.
Kirill Kaprizov scored his 36th goal of the year, but the Wild’s two-goal third-period outburst wasn't enough to secure the win.
Nazem Kadri recorded an assist in his first game back with Colorado since being traded from Calgary.
games.context: A battle between two of the NHL's top four teams in points; Colorado played without captain Gabriel Landeskog (lower body).

highlights.title: Wild vs. Avalanche | NHL Highlights | March 08, 2026

games.headline: Penguins erase three-goal deficit to stun Bruins without Crosby and Malkin
games.brief: The Pittsburgh Penguins authored a signature comeback on Sunday, rallying from three goals down to beat the Bruins in overtime. Despite missing legends Sidney Crosby and Evgeni Malkin, the Penguins found a hero in Anthony Mantha, who forced the issue in the third period before Tommy Novak ended it just seconds into the extra frame.
bullets: Tommy Novak scored the game-winner just 17 seconds into overtime.
Anthony Mantha became the first Penguin since 2002 to score two game-tying goals in a single third period.
Pavel Zacha notched his second career hat trick for Boston in the losing effort.
This was Pittsburgh's first three-goal comeback without both Crosby and Malkin since 2001.
games.context: Pittsburgh stays second in the Metro Division despite major injuries, while Boston's wild-card lead shrinks to three points.

highlights.title: Bruins vs. Penguins | NHL Highlights | March 08, 2026

games.headline: Sabres take division lead after chaotic 15-goal brawl with Lightning
games.brief: In what might be the game of the year, the Buffalo Sabres outslugged the Tampa Bay Lightning to take over first place in the Atlantic Division. This wasn't just a scoreboard explosion; it was a physical war featuring 100 penalty minutes and five fights, ending with Josh Doan’s power-play heroics to secure Buffalo’s seventh straight win.
bullets: Josh Doan scored two power-play goals, including the game-winner with 4:17 remaining.
Tage Thompson fueled the Buffalo offense with a massive four-assist night.
The teams combined for 100 penalty minutes and five fights in a battle for the division lead.
Nikita Kucherov led Tampa Bay with two goals and an assist, but the Lightning have now lost five of six.
games.context: Buffalo moves two points ahead of Tampa Bay for the Atlantic Division lead; the teams meet again April 6.

highlights.title: Lightning vs. Sabres | NHL Highlights | March 08, 2026

games.headline: Heiskanen ends it in overtime as red-hot Stars survive Bedard’s late heroics
games.brief: The Dallas Stars extended their incredible point streak to 12 games, but it wasn't easy. Chicago's Connor Bedard forced overtime with a clutch late goal, but Miro Heiskanen wasted no time in the extra session, scoring just 22 seconds in to keep the Stars on the heels of the top spot in the Western Conference.
bullets: Miro Heiskanen scored 22 seconds into OT to secure the extra point for Dallas.
Connor Bedard scored with 1:20 left in regulation to force overtime.
Dallas improved to 11-0-1 in their last 12 games, the best current stretch in the West.
Chicago fell to 15-3-2 when leading after two periods, a rare blown lead for the rebuilding Hawks.
games.context: Dallas strengthens its hold on second place in the Western Conference; Chicago rookie Oliver Moore left with an injury.

highlights.title: Blackhawks vs. Stars | NHL Highlights | March 08, 2026

games.headline: Detroit goalies combine for rare shutout to snap Devils' win streak
games.brief: The Detroit Red Wings used a tag-team effort in net to silence the high-powered Devils. After starter John Gibson was forced out with an injury, Cam Talbot stepped in to finish the job, marking the first time in over a decade that two Detroit netminders shared a shutout. Dominik Shine also provided a feel-good moment by netting his first NHL goal at age 32.
bullets: John Gibson (21 saves) and Cam Talbot (10 saves) combined for Detroit's first shared shutout since 2014.
Dominik Shine, a 32-year-old forward, scored his first career NHL goal in his 14th game.
Moritz Seider opened the scoring early and added an assist later in the game.
Defenseman Justin Faulk made his Red Wings debut after being acquired from St. Louis on Friday.
games.context: Detroit snapped New Jersey's four-game winning streak; Gibson's injury status remains a concern.

highlights.title: Red Wings vs. Devils | NHL Highlights | March 08, 2026

games.headline: Hofer earns fifth shutout as Blues sweep road trip in Anaheim
games.brief: The St. Louis Blues finished their road swing in style, blanking the Ducks behind a stellar performance from Joel Hofer. New addition Jonathan Drouin wasted no time making an impact, scoring in his team debut as the Blues continued their post-Olympic break surge. Anaheim struggled to generate anything, going scoreless on six power-play opportunities.
bullets: Joel Hofer made 22 saves to record his league-leading fifth shutout of the season.
Jonathan Drouin scored on a power-play slap shot in his first game since being traded from the Islanders.
The Blues have won five of their last six games since the Olympic break.
Anaheim finished their nine-game homestand with a 0-for-6 performance on the power play in the finale.
games.context: St. Louis swept their four-game road trip and integrated trade deadline acquisitions Drouin and Justin Holl.

highlights.title: Blues vs. Ducks | NHL Highlights | March 08, 2026

games.headline: Oilers strike three times in third to ground Golden Knights
games.brief: Edmonton turned up the heat in the final frame, scoring three goals in the third period to secure a massive divisional win in Las Vegas. While the Golden Knights struggled to find consistent offense, the Oilers' stars remained steady, with Connor McDavid extending his point streak and Kasperi Kapanen sealing the deal with an empty-netter to tighten the Pacific Division race.
bullets: Leon Draisaitl and Vasily Podkolzin scored key third-period goals to break a 1-1 tie.
Connor McDavid recorded two assists, extending his personal point streak to seven games.
Vegas has now lost five of their last six games as they struggle to keep pace at the top of the division.
Jack Eichel scored a short-handed goal late to give Vegas hope, but Kapanen's empty-netter ended the threat.
games.context: The Pacific Division race is tightening; only three points now separate Vegas (72) and Edmonton (70).

highlights.title: Oilers vs. Golden Knights | NHL Highlights | March 08, 2026
